heading: Omitted
label: 667a Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , §§ 1–4, , authorized compacts or agreements between or among the States bordering on the Atlantic Ocean with respect to fishing in the territorial waters and bays and inlets of the Atlantic Ocean on which such States border.act June 8, 1940, ch. 29554 Stat. 261, §§ 1–4, , granted the consent and approval of Congress to an interstate compact relating to the better utilization of the fisheries (marine, shell, and anadromous) of the Atlantic seaboard and creating the Atlantic States Marine Fisheries Commission.Act May 4, 1942, ch. 28356 Stat. 267, §§ 1–4, , granted the consent and approval of Congress to an amendment to the Atlantic States Marine Fisheries Compact and repealed limitation on the life of such compact.Act Aug. 19, 1950, ch. 76364 Stat. 467
amendments: CodificationSection, , §§ 1–4, , authorized compacts or agreements between or among the States bordering on the Atlantic Ocean with respect to fishing in the territorial waters and bays and inlets of the Atlantic Ocean on which such States border.act June 8, 1940, ch. 29554 Stat. 261, §§ 1–4, , granted the consent and approval of Congress to an interstate compact relating to the better utilization of the fisheries (marine, shell, and anadromous) of the Atlantic seaboard and creating the Atlantic States Marine Fisheries Commission.Act May 4, 1942, ch. 28356 Stat. 267, §§ 1–4, , granted the consent and approval of Congress to an amendment to the Atlantic States Marine Fisheries Compact and repealed limitation on the life of such compact.Act Aug. 19, 1950, ch. 76364 Stat. 467
